span.p:
Tractor sync writes
PluginRegistry node → OPFS.
Distro detects it and shifts
to graph-driven config.

span.p: Everything comes from the repo.\nTractor syncs an empty graph.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Shell plugins (Herald, Firefly)
still come from repo.
Content plugins + config
come from the graph.
